message:
🐛 Persist demo mode & agent selection across browser refresh (#316)

Two persistence bugs fixed:

1. auth.tsx: When user explicitly enables demo mode via toggle
   (kc-demo-mode=true in localStorage), don't clear the demo-token
   even if the backend is available. Previously, refreshing the page
   would detect the backend, clear the demo-token, and show the login
   screen — undoing the user's explicit demo mode choice.

2. useMissions.tsx: Agent selection (which AI agent — Claude, OpenAI,
   Gemini) was only sent via WebSocket and never persisted. On refresh,
   the WebSocket reconnects and agent selection was lost. Now saves to
   localStorage and restores on reconnect, syncing back to the server.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
